---
title: "Tooling"
subtitle: "How I use Claude Code: tool call patterns across coding sessions"
---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

data = FileAttachment("data/tool-usage.json").json()

// Color palette
scarlet = "#bb0000"
darkGray = "#333333"

// Day labels for heatmap
dayLabels = ["Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun"]
```

## Session Overview

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const s = data.session_stats;
  const meta = data.meta;
  const html = htl.html`<div class="stat-cards">
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-value">${s.total_sessions.toLocaleString()}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Sessions</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-value">${meta.total_records.toLocaleString()}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Tool Calls</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-value">${s.median_calls}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Median Calls / Session</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-value">${s.max_calls}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Max Calls (Single Session)</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-value">${s.mean_unique_tools}</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Avg Unique Tools / Session</div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  return html;
}
```

<p class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.85rem;">
Data spans ${data.meta.date_range.start} to ${data.meta.date_range.end} (${data.meta.total_records.toLocaleString()} tool calls across ${data.session_stats.total_sessions} sessions).
</p>

## Tool Usage Heatmap

When and how often tools are called, by hour of day and day of week.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 50,
  marginBottom: 40,
  padding: 0,
  width: 700,
  height: 240,
  x: {
    label: "Hour of Day (UTC)",
    domain: d3.range(24),
    tickFormat: d => `${d}:00`
  },
  y: {
    label: null,
    domain: d3.range(7),
    tickFormat: d => dayLabels[d]
  },
  color: {
    label: "Calls",
    scheme: "reds",
    type: "linear"
  },
  marks: [
    Plot.cell(data.heatmap, {
      x: "hour",
      y: "day_of_week",
      fill: "count",
      inset: 1,
      tip: true,
      title: d => `${dayLabels[d.day_of_week]} ${d.hour}:00 — ${d.count} calls`
    })
  ]
})
```

## Top Tools

The 15 most-used tools, colored by source (built-in vs MCP server).

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const top15 = data.tool_counts.slice(0, 15).map(d => ({
    ...d,
    source: d.mcp_server ? d.mcp_server : "builtin",
    short_tool: d.tool.replace("mcp__", "").replace(/__/g, ": ")
  }));

  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 180,
    width: 700,
    height: 400,
    x: { label: "Call Count" },
    y: {
      label: null,
      domain: top15.map(d => d.short_tool)
    },
    color: {
      legend: true,
      domain: [...new Set(top15.map(d => d.source))],
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(top15, {
        x: "count",
        y: "short_tool",
        fill: "source",
        sort: { y: "-x" },
        tip: true
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });
}
```

## MCP Server Breakdown

Tool calls to each MCP server, broken down by individual tool.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const mcp = data.mcp_breakdown.map(d => ({
    ...d,
    short_tool: d.tool.replace(`mcp__${d.server}__`, "")
  }));

  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 160,
    width: 700,
    height: Math.max(300, mcp.length * 20),
    x: { label: "Call Count" },
    y: { label: null },
    color: {
      legend: true,
      domain: [...new Set(mcp.map(d => d.server))]
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(mcp, {
        x: "count",
        y: "short_tool",
        fill: "server",
        sort: { y: "-x" },
        tip: true
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });
}
```

## Daily Trend

Total tool calls per day, stacked by source category.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Plot.plot({
  width: 700,
  height: 300,
  x: {
    label: "Date",
    type: "band"
  },
  y: { label: "Tool Calls" },
  color: {
    legend: true
  },
  marks: [
    Plot.barY(data.daily_trend, {
      x: "date",
      y: "count",
      fill: "server",
      tip: true,
      title: d => `${d.date} — ${d.server}: ${d.count}`
    }),
    Plot.ruleY([0])
  ]
})
```

## Project Breakdown

Tool calls by project — where the work happens.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const projects = data.project_breakdown;

  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 140,
    width: 700,
    height: Math.max(250, projects.length * 28),
    x: { label: "Call Count" },
    y: { label: null },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(projects, {
        x: "count",
        y: "project",
        fill: scarlet,
        sort: { y: "-x" },
        tip: true
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });
}
```

## Knowledge Graph Usage

Calls to the memory MCP server by operation type.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const entities = data.entity_access.map(d => ({
    ...d,
    short: d.entity.replace("mcp__memory__", "")
  }));

  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 140,
    width: 700,
    height: Math.max(200, entities.length * 30),
    x: { label: "Call Count" },
    y: { label: null },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(entities, {
        x: "count",
        y: "short",
        fill: scarlet,
        sort: { y: "-x" },
        tip: true
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });
}
```
